x-cdd-note: Generated by `cdd-kit openapi export` from the markdown API contract (the source of truth). Partial by design: request/response bodies are free-form prose in the contract and are marked unresolved. Do not hand-edit; regenerate from the contract.

statuses.description: Map of route → status; absent route defaults to released

eqpPackageLef.description: running lot Package LEF on equipment (priority-column key, primary)

eqpPjType.description: running lot PJ Type on equipment (priority-column key, secondary)

eqpWaferLot.description: running lot Wafer Lot on equipment (priority-column key, tertiary)

eqpUts.description: running lot UTS on equipment (priority-column key, quaternary)

equipment.description: single equipment ID; one row per equipment

lotId.description: running lot ID on the equipment

amplification.description: downstream_reject_rate / detection_reject_rate. null when detection_rate=0 (display dash); 0.0 when downstream=0 and detection>0.

pj_types.format: List of PJ_TYPE values from container_filter_cache

product_lines.format: List of PRODUCTLINENAME values (mapped from packages in cache)

pj_bops.format: List of PJ_BOP values (mapped from bops in cache)

updated_at.format: ISO-8601 cache refresh timestamp; null if cache never populated
